title: Template Unit
description: Schema that describes a Checkbox Template unit

template-description.title: Template Description (Template Unit)
template-description.description: Long form description of what the template does or the kind of jobs it instantiates.

template-unit.title: Template Unit Type (Template Unit)
template-unit.description: The unit type this template will generate.

template-resource.title: Template Resource (Template Unit)
template-resource.description: Name of the resource job to use to parametrize the template.

template-filter.title: Template Filter (Template Unit)
template-filter.description: Resource program that limits the set of records from which template instances will be made.

template-engine.title: Template Engine (Template Unit)
template-engine.description: Name of the template engine to use.
